notes: Three search piles at the Static Drive-In: the counter (the register and the candy case), the popper (the tools of the popcorn trade), the candy case (the inventory and the small things kept under it).

the_register_key.label: The register key
the_register_key.flavor: On the small ring with the soda-fountain cleanout cap. The register is mechanical; the key works the cash drawer.

your_notebook.label: Your grid-paper notebook
your_notebook.flavor: Mead. 70 pages. The first sixty-three are filled with transcripts and waveforms from the documentary. The pen is clipped through the spiral. You took it out of your apron earlier.

effects.text: [i]The notebook is out. READ STATIC will land now.[/i]

the_shift_log.label: The drive-in shift log
the_shift_log.flavor: Theo started one in '07. Spiral-bound. Tonight's entry, in your handwriting, says: 'feat 1 9:12 — 10:38 / inter 10:38 — 11:00 / feat 2 cued.'

the_scoop.label: The popcorn scoop
the_scoop.flavor: Aluminum. Bent on the right edge — Lou Comeaux dropped it in '03. Theo straightened it. It is still bent.

the_salt_shaker.label: The popper salt shaker
the_salt_shaker.flavor: Industrial; pours from the top. The salt is the same salt the place has used since opening. You note the consistency.

an_extra_butter_pump.label: Spare butter pump
an_extra_butter_pump.flavor: In the cabinet under the popper. The current pump has been making the sound. You don't, tonight, swap it out.

the_case_key.label: The candy case key
the_case_key.flavor: Small brass. On the same ring as the register key.

an_expired_inventory_list.label: Expired inventory list
an_expired_inventory_list.flavor: Two Hershey bars are out of date. One Reese's. The Sno-Caps. You should pull them. You will, in the morning.

lous_reeses.label: Lou's Reese's (last one)
lous_reeses.flavor: Marie Hebert bought one for Lou earlier. There's one Reese's left in the case after that purchase. You haven't, since June, taken food out of the case for yourself.

effects.text: You eat the Reese's. The peanut butter is the peanut butter. Your shoulders drop a half-inch.
